name: Judith Klopfenstein
body: Happy Easter to all! He is risen. He is risen indeed. We are sending love & prayers to you Lyla and your family. 😘❤️🙏 Love, Aunt Judy & Uncle Joe xo

name: Kathy Laub
body: Thank you so much for this update! No apologies needed! Praying! 🙏🙏🙏

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Easter blessings to your beautiful family. Prayers continue

name: Tara Puckett
body: So thankful for a chance to have been a little part of Lyla’s story. She has given us the sweetest most pure gift of all by just being a student in my class. To see the lives she’s touching through her perseverance, kindness and drive to be her best has made this group the most empathetic class I’ve seen in 20+ years of teaching. We will always be rooting for her and your family through this journey. Praying God gives you and the doctors good clear answers moving forward!
